source_rules: Jupiter-Moon together -> Hidden wealth (20 units)
Moon in the 2nd house gives firm wealth related results if Jupiter is also strongly placed.
Moon's 25% aspect on the 6th house (Ketu's house) can lead to lunacy or mental health issues.
Moon in the 2nd house gives the firm results of Jupiter.
Benefic Jupiter supplements the effect of Moon in H2.
Life will be troublesome up to the 25th year, or between the 25th and 75th years if longer.
The native will have an uncomfortable old age, particularly the 75th year.
Old age will be painful, particularly the 90th year.
Afflicted health or doubtful longevity of mother in the 9th, 18th, or 36th year.
If a son is born when Venus is in H6, the next son will be born after 12 years.
Venus in H6 does not directly affect the individual but their partner.
Mars in H3 leads to excessive romance/sex, which can be destructive to Jupiter and cause painful old age.
A planet in H3 or H12 other than Mars in H3, makes Mercury and Ketu malefic until age 34.
A person with Jupiter in H2 may receive lottery winnings, hidden wealth, and support from in-laws and father.
Venus in H9, Jupiter in H2, causes all-around happiness if the native is dutiful.
When life line starts from the mount of Jupiter, Saturn would be in House No.2.
Jupiter in H2 -> Law/Sermons.
If Saturn is in H.No.4, it will give property at the age of 36.
Saturn in the 4th house gives long life to the father, comfort, and property.
Saturn in the fourth house poisons the effects of Sun and Moon.
Saturn in H4 aspects houses 2, 8, 10, and 11 with four eyes, influencing planets/items within those houses.
Laying the foundation of a house while Saturn is in H4 brings misfortune related to snakes and poison to the mother and maternal uncle.
Saturn in H4 will not cause malefic effects, unless the native womanizes, poisoning Venus' effects.
Ketu in the 11th house bestows prosperity and progress.
During the reign of Ketu, the mother may die, but wealth grows.
Ketu in H11 -> Male child.
Ketu in H11 -> Order held enroute. Minor movement. Travel 11 times auspicious.
Ketu in H11 -> Gives male child.
remedy_hints: Shift Moon to House 2 [CRITICAL]: House 2 — Preferred house H2; Goswami pair Moon+Jupiter → H2. Articles: Mother milk, Rice, White Horse
Shift Moon to House 4 [CRITICAL]: House 4 — Preferred house H4; Goswami pair Moon+Jupiter → H4. Articles: Well, pool, Spring, Subsoil water, peace
Helpful Remedy: Monday: Donate milk or silver to a temple
Mars Malefic (-): Feed sweet tandoori rotis to dogs

age_75.prediction_text: Saturn in Mars's House No. 3 makes one penniless.
source_rules: Sun in House No.2 can indicate wealth.
All family members benefit from Mercury, Rahu, Ketu, and Saturn when Sun is in H2.
Jupiter-Moon together -> Hidden wealth (20 units)
Moon in the 10th house cuts the root of the snake and makes it poisonous.
Moon in H10 -> Ancestral Property
If Jupiter is in the 10th house, work related to Saturn will cause losses.
Jupiter in the 10th house brings wealth and a sober nature.
Jupiter in H10 -> Iron, House, Buffalo
Saturn in Mars's House No. 3 makes one penniless.
If Saturn is in H3, the native's in-laws will become wealthy.
Saturn in the third house poisons the effects of Sun and Mars.
If enemy planets are with or adjoining Saturn in H3, poor results of Ketu and Saturn.
Saturn confronts evil when Rahu is in the 8th house.
Rahu in H8 causes loss of male in-laws; in H12, loss of wealth.
If Ketu in the 12th house is not effective, its effect goes to the 2nd house.
Ketu in H12 -> Time to live with family. Promotion without transfer. Gainful travel.
remedy_hints: Helpful Remedy: Monday: Donate milk or silver to a temple
Mars Malefic (-): Feed sweet tandoori rotis to dogs
